subject: AI Widget DNS Down — Needs Jay Action
message: ai-widget.alexanderai.site is returning NXDOMAIN. The DNS record at name.com (registrar) is missing or was deleted. App code exists at alexander-ai-agent-widget/ with railway.json configured. Need Jay to log into name.com and recreate the CNAME record pointing ai-widget to the Railway app URL. Other subdomains (shop, agents) work via CNAME → *.up.railway.app for reference.
